summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested including new EAMCET exam type, Swiss High-Contrast dark design, Recharts visualizations (horizontal bar chart, scatter plot, line chart), historical trend modal, and 60 colleges (10 IIT, 22 NIT, 9 IIIT, 19 EAMCET).
seed_data_creation: 60 colleges seeded in MongoDB (10 IIT, 22 NIT, 9 IIIT, 19 EAMCET)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: (1) Home page with Swiss High-Contrast dark design, (2) 4-step profile form with JEE/NEET/EAMCET exam options, (3) Dashboard with Recharts visualizations - horizontal bar chart for probabilities, scatter plot for fees vs placement, (4) College cards with probability badges (Safe/Moderate/Ambitious), AI insights, predicted cutoffs, (5) Historical trend line chart modal showing opening/closing ranks over years, (6) College comparison table, (7) Wishlist with summary alert, (8) AI Chat (GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM), (9) Branch career roadmap modal. EAMCET filtering correctly returns only EAMCET colleges (CBIT, JNTU, Osmania, VNR, etc). JEE filtering correctly returns only IIT/NIT/IIIT colleges.

backend_apis: POST /api/recommendations (EAMCET) - Returns EAMCET colleges only (CBIT, JNTU, Osmania, etc)
frontend_flows: Home page with Swiss High-Contrast dark design (zinc palette, Outfit+IBM Plex Sans fonts)
4-step profile form with JEE/NEET/EAMCET exam options
Recharts horizontal bar chart showing top 10 admission probabilities
Recharts scatter plot showing fees vs avg placement
College cards with type badges, NIRF rank, probability badges, AI insights, predicted cutoffs
Historical trend line chart modal (opening/closing ranks over years)
College comparison table with all attributes
Wishlist toggle with summary alert button
AI Chat widget with real GPT-5.2 responses
new_in_iteration_2: EAMCET filtering returns only EAMCET colleges (19 colleges)
